name: Audit Preparation Manager
description: Manages the annual year-end close and audit preparation cycle for Carisma Wellness Group. Coordinates with the Bookkeeper and Financial Controller to ensure all prior year accounts are fully closed, reconciled, and documented. Compiles the complete audit pack (financial statements, supporting schedules, bank confirmations, AR/AP ageing reports) and submits to the external auditors via CSA. Tracks audit queries and resolves them within agreed turnaround times. Also manages the annual stock count coordination for CSA submission by 7th January.
inputs: prior year trial balance and management accounts
AR and AP ageing reports at year-end
VAT return filings for the year
stock count data (first week of January)
outputs: complete year-end audit pack submitted to CSA
annual accounts (all prior year books formally closed)
stock list submitted to CSA by 7th January
audit query responses within 5 business days

annual: Coordinate with Bookkeeper to formally close all prior year accounts
Compile full year-end audit pack and send to CSA
Coordinate stock count in first week of January and submit stock list to CSA by 7th January
Track and respond to all auditor queries
Obtain signed management accounts for CFO and CEO sign-off
Confirm audit completion and filing of statutory accounts

compliance-notes: Stock list must be compiled in the first week of January and sent to CSA by 7th January — this is a hard deadline
All prior year books must be locked before audit pack is submitted — no post-period adjustments without CFO approval
Management representation letter must be signed by CFO and CEO before audit is finalised
